MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN OPPOSITION TO DEFENDANT PAUL HAZELL'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BECKER, RONNEY

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT PAUL HAZELL'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT - DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE 3RD AND 5TH CAUSES OF ACTION. THERE ARE NO ALLEGATIONS SHOWING THAT DEFENDANT HAZELL WAS A PARTY TO THE 1999 AGREEMENT AND PLAINTIFF PREVIOUSLY ADMITTED THAT THE 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS DIRECTED ONLY TOWARDS BOSS. THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE 9TH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE THAT HE PAID MORE THAN IS FAIR SHARE. THE DEMURRER IS OVERRULED AS TO THE REMAINDER. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ROCK AND ROSE LANDSCAPING & BIRKMYER ASSOCIATES DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. THIS IS NOT A DERIVATIVE ACTION BUT AN INDIVIDUAL ACTION. SEE JARA V. SUPREMA MEATS INC., (2004) 121 CAL.APP.4TH 1238. FURTHER, PLAINTIFF HAS SUFFICIENTLY PLED CONSIDERATION UNDER THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT AND FRAUD ALLEGATIONS UNDER THE 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION. DEFENDANT MUST FILE ANSWER WITHIN 10 DAYS OF ENTRY OF THE ORDER. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-10-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT PAUL HAZELL'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted as to the word fraud in paragraph 2 of the prayer. It is denied as to the remainder. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-10-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT PAUL HAZELL'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: defendant Hazell's demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to the 3rd and 5th causes of action. There are no allegations showing that defendant Hazell was a party to the 1999 agreement and plaintiff previously admitted that the 5th cause of action is directed only towards boss. The demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the 9th cause of action for plaintiff to allege that he paid more than is fair share. The demurrer is overruled as to the remainder. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-09-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT ROCK AND ROSE LANDSCAPING & BIRKMYER ASSOCIATES DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. THIS IS NOT A DERIVATIVE ACTION BUT AN INDIVIDUAL ACTION. SEE JARA V. SUPREMA MEATS INC., (2004) 121 CAL.APP.4TH 1238. FURTHER, PLAINTIFF HAS SUFFICIENTLY PLED CONSIDERATION UNDER THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT AND FRAUD ALLEGATIONS UNDER THE 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION. DEFENDANT MUST FILE ANSWER WITHIN 10 DAYS OF ENTRY OF THE ORDER. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

Off Calendar Dec-29-2010 Continued To Mar-04-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-20-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: David A. Butler, Jr., Esq., Attorney at Law, 650-873-3168 , For Defendant and moving party: Philip Birkmyer
Larry B. Panek, Esq., Carroll, Burdick & McDonough, LLP, 925-944-6080 For Plaintiff and opposing party: Ronney Becker
Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling with modification.
DEFENDANT PHILIP BIRKMYER (erroneously sued as Phillip Birkmayer)'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Demurrer Sustained in part and overruled in part.
Demurrer to the 2nd. cause of action for conversion is overruled.
Demurrer sustained without leave to amend as to 3rd. and 5th. causes of action wich plaintiff agrees are not directed at Birkmyer.
Sustained with leave to amend as to 4th. cause of action for plaintiff to plead whether contract was oral, written or implied by conduct;
Demurrer to 7th. cause of action for Constructive Trust is overruled.
Demurrer to 8th. cause of action for Indemnity is overruled.
Sustained with leave to amend as to 9th. cause of action for plaintiff to allege that plaintiff has paid more than his fair share, or that he has in fact paid anything on the debts.
Demurrer to 10th. cause of action for Declaratory relied is overruled.
Plaintiff waives notice of this order and shall have 20 days to amend. Order signed in open court. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT

MINI MINUTES:

Argued and the COURT VACATES ITS TENTATIVE RULING.
DEFENDANT PHILIP BIRKMYER'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF COMPLAINT IS GRANTED IN PART.

Plaintiff waives notice of this order and shall have 20 days to amend. Order signed in open court. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
